message:
Update workspace dependencies: replace ratatui/crossterm with ftui crates

Why: The TUI code was migrated to the FrankenTUI stack in the previous
commit. The workspace Cargo.toml and rch/Cargo.toml must reflect this
dependency swap so the project compiles against the new backend.

What changed in Cargo.toml (workspace root):
  - Removed: ratatui 0.30.0, crossterm 0.29
  - Added: ftui (with "runtime" feature), ftui-core, ftui-render,
    ftui-style, ftui-text, ftui-layout, ftui-widgets, ftui-tty,
    ftui-backend — all as path dependencies from /dp/frankentui/crates/

What changed in rch/Cargo.toml:
  - Replaced ratatui and crossterm workspace deps with the nine ftui
    workspace deps listed above.

What changed in Cargo.lock:
  - Resolved the new ftui path dependencies and their transitive deps
    (ahash, arc-swap, etc.).
  - Removed now-unused transitive dependencies from the ratatui/crossterm
    tree (atomic, bytemuck, castaway, compact_str, csscolorparser,
    deltae, lab, etc.).
  - Deduplicated several crate versions (bit-set, bit-vec, darling,
    darling_core, darling_macro, phf, syn) that previously had multiple
    versions due to the ratatui dependency tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
